MINI MINUTES:
No appearances: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)
